title: Rounded Hotbar
description: Rounded Hotbar - A custom resource pack that redesigns Minecraft’s default hotbar with a rounded, simplistic design.
body:
## Works on any verision from 1.21+

You guessed it this pack makes the player's Hotbar Rounded, This is my first resource pack so I hope you enjoy it, I also plan on making other resource packs in the near future!

# What's changed

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
1. Player's Hot-bar

</details>
